source.caption: Épure E 90 (a) : ligne de terre (LT V'/H, quasi horizontale), droite oblique (P^V') et droite verticale, avec les points A, B, M en double projection. On cherche la vraie grandeur du segment oblique B–M lu sur ses deux projections.

notes: Plate rotated 180deg (transform translate(720 530) rotate(180)); every coordinate here is in visual/display space = (720-x_src, 530-y_src).
Ligne de terre drawn slightly sloped (visual (32,248)->(687,306)); straightened exactly horizontal (rotation 0), position only translated to y=290 near the B/M construction.

Oblique line P^V' carries B and M: their frontal projections B^V'(524,395) and M^V'(571,446) sit on it, each joined to its horizontal projection B^H(513,274)/M^H(567,272) by a drawn vertical rappel (abscissae x=524 and x=571). h/v snapped to the shared rappel abscissa (lossless).
line_true_length COMPUTES the vraie grandeur of B–M from the 3D lift; the rabattu/primed construction on the sheet is omitted, not reused.

A lies on the droite verticale (its frontal projection A^V is on that quasi-vertical line), not on the oblique — kept as a single-view label so it renders without being lifted. Droite verticale drawn as segment V1–V2 (helper endpoints of the drawn line, visual (140,20)->(190,460)).
